name: Target Account Coverage Gap
description: Identifies target accounts that aren't being adequately covered (no engagement, no opportunities) and recommends reactivation actions categorized by root cause. Replaces the year-end discovery that a third of named accounts received zero touches.
alsoSurfaces: Which Tier 1 accounts have received zero outbound touches in the window?
How does the gap break down by category (no coverage / light / cooled-out / buying-group gap)?
Which root cause dominates: assignment, execution, or sustained-attention?
What specific reactivation actions should we take, and on which accounts?
beforeWeRun: Account list: Tier 1, all named accounts, or custom?
Coverage gap threshold: fewer than 3, 5, or 10 buying-group signals?

whatYoullGet.name: Coverage state
whatYoullGet.desc: One paragraph headline: of N target accounts, X% are in coverage-gap states, broken down by category and tier.

whatYoullGet.name: Accounts at risk
whatYoullGet.desc: Markdown table: account, tier, current owner, last engagement, gap category, root cause.

whatYoullGet.name: Root cause analysis
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs on the dominant root causes: assigned-but-not-worked vs. cooled-out vs. never-assigned, with implications.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommended actions
whatYoullGet.desc: 3–5 specific actions tied to root cause categories, naming counts and target teams.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Buying-group definition, signal weights, gap threshold, period boundaries, sources read with row counts.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your coverage-gap memo in ~13 min.
